精彩"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770353360,"group_id":"7602433494714682392","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"能接触社会的方方面面，熟读历史，描写历史英雄人物实现个人理想","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N20LO1sNhx+MQh7nTi3qFZQ579+CPg+WxunUJO7Y2IIa","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c997a544879247aeabd1bc210099cf91~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776623395\u0026x-signature=JCtv%2FgcsZUDEHdALb%2Bk6p4npDaU%3D","user_id":"3474054552756508","user_name":"我思故我在1992"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3474054552756508","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家Lv.2\",\"title_id\":\"author_level_2\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家Lv.2\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7602433494714682392","book_info":{"abstract":"现在法医林风穿越到康熙朝福建水师提督、靖海侯施琅的纨绔儿子施世纶身上，开启系统，在康熙朝智斗权臣索额图，利用现代法医知识破获大案、要案；利用现代农耕技术和水利技术，帮助百姓摆脱饥荒、治理水患；利用现代医学知识帮助百姓抵御疫情；利用历史知识，生财有道，又反哺百姓；通过团队合作，打击地方恶霸和黑暗势力；通过自己的魅力，娶了三个老婆，包括一个女将军，最终成为一代清官；本书展示了施世纶波澜壮阔的一生，同时传递了邪不压正的正能量。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/ai/48710ae2370d85847ac81fa17b21ec9e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"我思故我在1992","author_id":"","book_id":"7602433494714682392","book_name":"我在康熙朝搞廉政","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#a09080","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_s
